summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Finance Data Processing backend with role-based access control. All backend APIs, frontend integration, and RBAC features working perfectly.
passed_tests: Dashboard summary with totals and breakdowns
Role-based access control (viewer cannot create records)
Frontend login form with pre-filled credentials
RBAC UI restrictions (viewer cannot see Users tab or Add Record button)
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all integration tests passed), RBAC: 100% (all access control tests passed)
